strategy_purposes.title: Why we exist
strategy_purposes.statement: Strengthen civic participation through governed institutional action.

strategy_visions.statement: A community where every citizen can participate effectively in public life.

strategy_mission_statements.statement: Equip institutions and volunteers with governed tools for learning, mission execution, and accountability.

strategy_goals.title: Improve Volunteer Training
strategy_goals.description: Increase certified volunteer readiness across programs.

strategy_objectives.title: Launch Learning Academy
strategy_objectives.description: Deploy governed learning paths tied to mission competencies.

ops_operational_missions.title: Volunteer Training Mission
ops_operational_missions.description: Prepare volunteers for county immersion activities
ops_operational_missions.desired_outcome: Certified volunteers ready for field missions
ops_operational_missions.success_definition: All required tasks and checklist items complete

ops_institutions.mission_statement: Equip institutions and volunteers with governed tools for learning, mission execution, and accountability.
ops_institutions.vision_statement: A community where every citizen can participate effectively in public life.

ops_calendar_events.title: Volunteer Training Kickoff
ops_calendar_events.description: Opening session for field volunteer training mission
ops_calendar_events.location: Block Street Training Center — Meeting Room A

ops_conversations.title: Volunteer Training Mission Room
ops_conversations.description: Collaboration space for field volunteer training mission

ops_comm_messages.body: We will finalize training materials by August 10 and use the field van for supply delivery.

ops_decision_ledger.decision: Training kickoff will be held at Block Street Training Center
ops_decision_ledger.reason: Facility capacity and accessibility requirements met

ops_executive_decisions.question: Approve additional training materials budget?
ops_executive_decisions.context: Volunteer training mission requires flyer replenishment before kickoff
ops_executive_decisions.recommendation: Approve $500 from mission budget—remaining balance sufficient

ops_executive_alerts.title: Training flyer inventory below reorder threshold
ops_executive_alerts.what_happened: Volunteer recruitment flyers at 500 units, threshold is 150
ops_executive_alerts.why_it_matters: Training kickoff on August 15 requires adequate materials

ops_executive_timeline.title: Training venue confirmed
ops_executive_timeline.description: Block Street Training Center selected for volunteer training kickoff

ops_workflow_templates.name: New Volunteer Onboarding
ops_workflow_templates.description: Automated onboarding for new volunteers with Human approval gate

ops_workflows.name: New Volunteer Onboarding
ops_workflows.textual_representation: Workflow "New Volunteer Onboarding": WHEN [volunteer_registered, manual_trigger] THEN notify_users → assign_human → create_task [approval] → schedule_event

ops_intelligence_insights.title: Training mission on track with volunteer capacity risk
ops_intelligence_insights.summary: Volunteer training mission progressing; monitor flyer inventory and orientation scheduling
ops_intelligence_insights.reasoning_summary: Mission health stable; resource constraint identified

ops_intelligence_forecasts.prediction: Volunteer training mission likely to complete on schedule

ops_continuity_plans.communications_plan: SMS, email, and push notifications via emergency broadcast

ops_federation_profiles.name: Block Street Civic Coalition
ops_federation_profiles.description: Regional coalition of civic action institutions
ops_federation_profiles.purpose: Coordinate volunteer training, community outreach, and emergency mutual aid

charter.mission: Strengthen civic institutions through governed collaboration
charter.vision: A resilient network of independent organizations working as one
charter.membership_rules: Verified institutions with signed charter acceptance
charter.voting_rules: Simple majority for operational decisions; super majority for charter changes
charter.data_policies: Institutional data remains owned; sharing requires explicit permission
